class FenwickTree
  attr_reader :tree, :size

  def initialize(size)
    @tree = Array.new(size + 2, 0)
    @size = size
  end

  def update(index, delta)
    index += 1 # convert to 1-based
    while index <= @size
      @tree[index] += delta
      index += index & -index
    end
  end

  def query(index)
    index += 1 # convert to 1-based
    res = 0
    while index > 0
      res += @tree[index]
      index -= index & -index
    end
    res
  end

  def range_query(l, r)
    query(r) - query(l - 1)
  end
end

def solve(nums, queries)
  n = nums.length
  depths = Array.new(n) { 0 }
  nums.each_with_index do |num, i|
    x = num
    d = 0
    while x != 1
      x = x.bit_count
      d += 1
    end
    depths[i] = d
  end

  bits = Array.new(6) { FenwickTree.new(n) }

  nums.each_with_index do |num, i|
    d = depths[i]
    if d <= 5
      bits[d].update(i, 1)
    end
  end

  answer = []
  queries.each do |q|
    if q[0] == 1
      l = q[1].to_i
      r = q[2].to_i
      k = q[3].to_i
      if k < 0 || k > 5
        answer << 0
        next
      end
      res = bits[k].range_query(l, r)
      answer << res
    else
      idx = q[1].to_i
      val = q[2].to_i
      old_val = nums[idx]
      old_depth = depths[idx]
      if old_depth <= 5
        bits[old_depth].update(idx, -1)
      end
      new_val = val
      new_depth = 0
      while new_val != 1
        new_val = new_val.bit_count
        new_depth += 1
      end
      nums[idx] = val
      depths[idx] = new_depth
      if new_depth <= 5
        bits[new_depth].update(idx, 1)
      end
    end
  end
  answer
end

class FenwickTree
  def initialize(size)
    @size = size
    @tree = Array.new(size + 1, 0)
  end

  def update(index, delta)
    # 1-based index
    index += 1
    while index <= @size
      @tree[index] += delta
      index += index & -index
    end
  end

  def query(index)
    # 1-based index
    index += 1
    res = 0
    while index > 0
      res += @tree[index]
      index -= index & -index
    end
    res
  end

  def range_query(l, r)
    query(r) - query(l - 1)
  end
end
